Name: AWS - Set Blue-Green Target Group
Description: Sets 100% of traffic to the online target group, and 0% to the offline target group

Parameters.Name: AWSBlueGreen.AWS.Region
Parameters.Label: Region
Parameters.HelpText: The AWS region. See https://aws.amazon.com/about-aws/global-infrastructure/regions_az/ for more information.

Parameters.Name: AWSBlueGreen.AWS.RuleArn
Parameters.Label: Rule ARN
Parameters.HelpText: The ARN of the listener rule to update. See https://docs.aws.amazon.com/elasticloadbalancing/latest/application/listener-update-rules.html for more information.

Parameters.Name: AWSBlueGreen.AWS.OfflineTargetGroup
Parameters.Label: Offline Target Group ARN
Parameters.HelpText: The ARN of the target group that should receive 0% of the traffic. See https://docs.aws.amazon.com/elasticloadbalancing/latest/application/load-balancer-target-groups.html for more information.

Parameters.Name: AWSBlueGreen.AWS.OnlineTargetGroup
Parameters.Label: Online Target Group ARN
Parameters.HelpText: The ARN of the target group that should receive 100% of the traffic. See https://docs.aws.amazon.com/elasticloadbalancing/latest/application/load-balancer-target-groups.html for more information.
